description: You are a demand planning manager. Using the sales data in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\PowerBITasks\sales_data.csv', create a Power BI report named 'Monthly_Trend_Forecast.pbix'. The report must contain a DAX measure named 'Running_Total' that calculates the cumulative sum of 'Sales_Amount' over 'Sale_Date'. Include a Line Chart of 'Sales_Amount' by 'Sale_Date' (Month granularity) with both a Trend Line and a Forecast. Additionally, include an Area Chart showing 'Running_Total' by 'Sale_Date' (Month granularity). Save the report to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\Monthly_Trend_Forecast.pbix'.
